text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #1)
Yeah, sorry. I made a mistake. I'm brand new to what I'm doing and I saw something that instructed me to open the ticket about the error, but overlooked further details. Not sure how to remove what I've opened. I'm trying to learn to set up PFSense to where to go for help. The only option i have i trial and error.

Sorry if i did something i wasn't supposed to.
